reviews.comment: Storm Electrical Solutions did a fine job for us which required installing new heat lamps as well as some minor electrical light repairs.  They helped with selection of products, sourcing some unusual parts and solving practical issues with the installation.  All of the electricians working on the job were most professional, polite and highly skilled. They were careful in all respects including protecting the surfaces and in cleaning up after the jobs. Karl is highly competent and a great communicator.  A pleasure to deal with and the costs were clearly outlined and reasonable. We won’t hesitate to use them again.

Karl & team came out to inspect and clean my solar panels they installed 6 years ago.  They were quite flexible with scheduling given Melbourne weather and finished the job in no time.  Karl advised panels should be cleaned regularly for optimum efficiency, so I'm now set up for annual reminders.
Karl and the Storm team have come to the rescue many a time in our house! They are always punctual, professional and explain the tricky bits with ease. Highly recommend!

We recently used Storm to replace our entire very old ducted heating. Karl and his team were all lovely, polite guys who did a fantastic job and helped us get the maximum rebate from the government scheme. Our new system is fantastic! Very happy with the service. Thank you Storm 😁

We recently used Karl and his team of electricians as part of our home renovation and they were fantastic. They helped wire our new kitchen, dining area and bathroom, and the whole process was smooth from start to finish. Their pricing was very reasonable, communication was excellent, and they had a real can-do attitude to every request. Highly recommend!

Karl and his team are awesome. Really efficient , great work and polite . Huge relief to get our work done promptly as had a dodgy power point and completed other work Totally our go to now . Highly recommend them ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
Karl and the team at Storm Electrical have been fantastic in rewiring our home for renovation. Great workmanship and professionalism.
Quote was reasonable, and they were able to repair our switch the very next morning. Was impressed with the service provided and would use them again.
Karl was friendly, punctual and repaired our electrical issues very quickly. Very happy with his work.
Great service from Karl & his team from the moment I rang to enquire. Quick, friendly and well priced, thank you!

Storm Electrical Solutions were excellent! Friendly service, who were easy to get hold of and book an appointment. They were able to give expert advice regarding lighting and fan choice and suggestions on positioning. The team were hard working and kept our house as clean and tidy as possible throughout the job. We would highly recommend and are delighted with the result. It has elevated the look of our house. Thank you

Impecable job, efficient and professional. Reliable company. It’s a bit pricey but it worth it. They cleaned after they finished and my white walls remained spotless. I had 5 new outlets and a led stripe in my kitchen. Lewis, Kane and Karl did a great Job. I’ll recommend them to my  acquaintances.

Karl Rainbow was exceptional. For the last 6 months, he has endlessly come to try to fix my air conditioning system, trying all avenues and options. Karl, is so approachable, so considerate, and so kind. While here, I asked him to help me out with something minor, and he automatically offered his assistance. Karl, always kept me posted with outcomes, and with processes. As he left today, he said to me...any issues with anything, don't hesitate to ask...this is service that adds value to someone's life.
I have shared with family and friends, the amazing service from Storm Electrical Solutions.
